title: solanum hjertingii var. physaloides
intro: Solanum hjertingii var. physaloides is a variety of the Solanum hjertingii plant, which belongs to the nightshade family and is native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Solanum hjertingii var. physaloides include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams to utilize its medicinal properties.
